Container.Name: localbox
Container.Overview: Infinite Jukebox for your own music library. Browse the music share mounted at /music, click any track, and it plays forever - the app analyses the song locally (librosa) and seamlessly loops between similar beats. Fully offline; no Spotify or YouTube. First play of a track takes a few seconds to analyse, then it is cached.
Container.Description: Infinite Jukebox for your local music library. Local analysis, no external services. Point /music at your library (read-write, for the .localbox cache) and /data at appdata (fallback cache).

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web interface (maps to container port 8080)

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Your music library. Mounted READ-WRITE because the analysis/fingerprint cache is stored inside it at .localbox (so it travels with the music). Only the .localbox folder is written.

Config.Name: Store cache in library
Config.Description: 1 = keep analysis/transcodes inside the library at .localbox (needs the read-write mount above). 0 = keep them in the Cache/Data path below and treat the library as read-only.

Config.Name: Cache / Data (fallback)
Config.Description: Used only when 'Store cache in library' is 0 (or the library is read-only).

Config.Name: AcoustID Key
Config.Description: Optional. Acoustic fingerprinting fallback for untagged files. Free key at https://acoustid.org/new-application

Config.Name: Force Transcode Extensions
Config.Description: Optional. Comma list of extensions to always transcode to mp3 for the browser, e.g. .flac,.wav . Leave blank to only transcode when needed.
